narrative:
Jefferson Twp township has 9,113 registered voters, with 57.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 21.3 percentage points.
